attempts.test_code:
import source


def test_source_module_imports():
    assert source is not None


def test_quicksort_with_duplicates():
    # The bug: greater partition uses x > pivot, which drops equal values
    # Test with duplicates to reveal this: [3, 1, 3, 2]
    arr = [3, 1, 3, 2]
    result = source.quicksort(arr)

    # Fixed code should return sorted array with all elements preserved
    assert result == [1, 2, 3, 3], f"Expected [1, 2, 3, 3] but got {result}"
    assert len(result) == len(arr), f"Length not preserved: {len(result)} != {len(arr)}"
    assert result == sorted(arr), f"Result not sorted: {result} != {sorted(arr)}"
